stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - VFR Chart ED-4.
A VFR flight from RODING VOR/DME (RDG, N49°02.5' E012°31.5') is on 065º radial of RODING VOR. To receive the latest QNH, the pilot of the aircraft enters a frequency of 123.42 MHz. The name of the suitable frequency is…
